productDisplayName: Doodle Girl Super stylish White Tops
description: Composition White round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and graphic print on the front that has a black bow Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print dress your little princess in this white t-shirt from doodle and let her flaunt her beauty in style with this tee. The graphic print with the bow on the shoe add an element of sweetness, while the cotton fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Pair this top with a shorts and sandals to complete her look.
